testcase.name: suggest_errorResponse_hasConsistentEnvelope
testcase.system-out:
14:41:29.250 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.example.taskmanager.controller.AiControllerTest]: AiControllerTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 14:41:29.449 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.example.taskmanager.TaskManagerApplication for test class com.example.taskmanager.controller.AiControllerTest

testcase.name: suggest_aiServiceThrowsIllegalState_returns502
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-20T14:41:33.159-04:00 ERROR 25528 --- [task-manager] [ main] c.e.t.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : AI service error (technical): AI response was not valid JSON

testcase.name: suggest_missingBody_returns400
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-20T14:41:33.251-04:00 WARN 25528 --- [task-manager] [ main] c.e.t.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : Request body missing or unreadable: Required request body is missing: public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<com.example.taskmanager.domain.dto.AiDtos$AiSuggestResponse> com.example.taskmanager.controller.AiController.suggest(com.example.taskmanager.domain.dto.AiDtos$AiSuggestRequest)
